gratitude.name: Gratitude
gratitude.short_desc:
You could be doing any number of cool and interesting things right now; but you're here, wandering through some guy's dream space-slash-environment art portfolio. And that guy is very, very grateful for your time and presence.

There's no real gameplay or through-line here, but there are a number of vistas and curiosities to seek out, some of which might resonate and remain with you.

erudite_mushrooms.name: Erudite Mushrooms
erudite_mushrooms.short_desc: The mushrooms have absorbed almost all that these books contain, ink crumbling further into anonymity with each fungal inquiry. Particularly voracious readers, these caps are.

aoibhe.name: Aoibhe
aoibhe.short_desc: The very air seems to whisper the name 'Aoibhe', as if the walls know her better than any living soul.

object_text.scruffy_plush: The main difference between your floating core and this Scruffy plush is that he seems much newer and crisper, perhaps even unused and untouched. Are there more around?
